utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with details as requested: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, details, viewing/closing, confirmation) – fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, fees, incentive, timeline, reference) – fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, package, cost, services list, contact, reference) – fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, package, cost, date, reference) – fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities package with cost/services/activation/ref; plus property survey with provider/type/cost/date/ref) – fully specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (itemized costs, totals, monthly payment) – fully specified. All 6 items are present and contain appropriate detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes a specific purchase property (a family house at $650K), a financing choice consistent with First-Time Buyer, legal services named Premium Legal Package, a property survey named Full Structural Survey, moving services matching Standard Moving, and a utilities setup that aligns with Premium Utilities. I mapped each explicitly named or clearly corresponding item to the ground-truth ratings.
